The '''Battle for the Darksaber''' was fought in the asteroid field of the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces, fearing another [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] incident, ambushed and sabotaged the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] weapon.

In the process, the New Republic lost one of its greatest generals, [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], and the battle ended on a worse note: his ultimate sacrifice was summarily wasted on a flawed weapon that malfunctioned, failed to even fire properly and was destroyed by two planetoid size asteroids within the asteroid belt when its [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] refused to fire to clear the path.

==Behind the scenes==
Although an [[:File:Darksaber.jpg|image]] from ''The New Essential Chronology'' shows a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] as part of the fleet attacking the Darksaber, the novel does not state that any such ships took part in the battle. It may be intended to depict the [[Dodonna (Assault Frigate)|''Dodonna'']], which is an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] rather than a standard Dreadnaught.
